hero.subtitulo: Ecotourism Park in the Huasteca Potosina
hero.descripcion: 680 hectares along the river in El Naranjo, S.L.P. Waterfalls, camping, cabins, and adventure surrounded by nature.

fauna.descripcion: EjiXhole is located in the municipality of El Naranjo, in the heart of the Huasteca Potosina, a region with great wildlife diversity. During your visit you might spot species such as:
fauna.aviso: Wildlife lives freely, so every sighting depends on the season, weather, and the animals' natural behavior. We're committed to respecting and preserving their habitat.

historia.texto: EjiXhole was born as a Nature Reserve and Ecotourism Park with a clear purpose: to share the beauty of El Naranjo with those seeking an authentic connection with nature. More than a tourist destination, we're a place where families, friends, and adventurers disconnect from routine, enjoy the river and waterfalls, and take home memories that last — always with respect for the land that welcomes them.

mision.texto: To deliver memorable ecotourism experiences through warm, safe, and responsible service, driving sustainable tourism and care for the nature of the Huasteca Potosina.

items: Take care of the water and trails.

descubre.descripcion: If you visit EjiXhole, you can also explore some of the region's main attractions.

elMeco.texto: One of the most impressive waterfalls in the Huasteca Potosina, known for its dramatic drop and spectacular scenery.

elSalto.texto: A beautiful natural spot to enjoy the river and admire one of the municipality's best-known waterfalls.

rutaTurquesa.texto: The municipality is part of the famous Turquoise Route of the Huasteca Potosina, known for its crystal-clear rivers, waterfalls, and ecotourism activities like kayaking, hiking, and birdwatching.

queIncluye.descripcion: All of this is part of your park entrance.

actividades.nota: These activities are booked directly at the park, subject to availability — they are not booked online.

galeria.descripcion: Real moments from the people who've already visited.

comida.aviso: We don't have a restaurant yet — we recommend bringing your own food and supplies. The nearest store is 15-20 minutes from the park.

clima.historico: Historical average for this time of year
clima.error: Couldn't load the weather right now.

mapa.descripcion: Follow the road and let the scenery surprise you.
mapa.caminoTexto: The final stretch is a dirt road — part of the adventure starts before you arrive. It's suitable for cars, pickup trucks, and vans; check your route on Maps before heading out.
mapa.tiemposAviso: Estimated, no traffic. Check your exact route on Google Maps before heading out.

tipo.titulo: What would you like to book?
tipo.hospedajeDesc: 2 rooms and 1 cabin available, up to 4 people each

reservar.excedeCapacidad: This unit allows a maximum of {{max}} people. If your group is bigger, book this unit for the people who fit and make a separate Camping reservation for the rest.
reservar.avisoGrupoGrande: Each room/cabin has a people limit. If your group is bigger, book the unit for those who fit and add a separate Camping reservation for the rest — camping has no people limit.
reservar.avisoNoReembolsable: This booking is non-refundable if you don't show up on the scheduled day.

combi.descripcion: If you'd like help arranging a shuttle van for your trip, check this box and we'll contact you to quote availability and cost.

ctaConversion.titulo: Join those who've already lived EjiXhole
ctaConversion.descripcion: Read their real experiences above — now it's your turn to live it.

consejos.descripcionPrep: Everything we recommend bringing, according to past visitors.
consejos.descripcion: Real recommendations from people who've already visited.
items: Visitors recommend visiting between November and April to see the river's most intense turquoise color.
The camping area is the most affordable lodging option at the park.
The park has limited capacity in high season — visitors suggest arriving early.
